sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى السُّوقِ مَعَ أُمِّهِ صَبَاحَ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je otišao na pijacu sa svojom majkom u petак ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad went to the market with his mother on Friday morning.

sentences.arabic: رَأَى هُنَاكَ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْفَوَاكِهِ وَالْخُضَرَاوَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Tamo je vidio puno voća i povrća.
sentences.translationEn: He saw many fruits and vegetables there.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتِ الأُمُّ مِنْهُ أَنْ يَخْتَارَ فَاكِهَةً لِلْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Majka ga je zamolila da odabere voće za porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: His mother asked him to choose fruit for the family.

sentences.arabic: اخْتَارَ أَحْمَدُ الْبُرْتُقَالَ وَالتُّفَّاحَ وَابْتَسَمَتْ أُمُّهُ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je odabrao naranče i jabuke i majka mu se nasmiješila.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad chose oranges and apples and his mother smiled.
